description: Composition Brown and white kurta made of a blended fabric, has a V-neck, brown yoke with diagonal white stitch detailing, short sleeves with stitch detailing on the cuffs to match the yoke and floral print Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Vintage weaves, classic cuts and contemporary style - all come together in this kurta from diva. Crafted from a soft blended fabric, it offers exemplary comfort all day. Pair it with patialas or churidars and embellished slippers for an ethnic look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
